prestazioni: Engine: F120A 2.9L twin-turbo V8 (IHI-derived turbos upgraded to Garrett GT35R with billet compressor wheels, 1.5 bar boost, custom titanium wastegates, and 44mm external wastegate actuators for 750+ hp at 8,000 RPM)

Fuel System: Full sequential Bosch Motorsport MS3.1.2 ECU with dual 1200cc/min ID1000 injectors, upgraded Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pump, and custom billet fuel rails with -8AN fittings; paired with a Motec PDM15 for power distribution and failsafe monitoring

Drivetrain: G-Force GF-5R 5-speed dog-ring gearbox with billet 23-spline input shaft, upgraded carbon synchros, and a 2.73:1 final drive ratio; coupled with a Tilton triple-plate carbon clutch and a 200mm billet flywheel for rapid gear engagement under sustained 3.5G cornering
estetica: Aerodynamics: Full carbon-fiber LM-spec bodykit by Ferrari Classiche, including a 3D-scanned front splitter with integrated dive planes (generating 220kg downforce at 200 km/h), a Kevlar-reinforced rear diffuser with active Gurney flap (adjustable via cockpit switch), and a fixed rear wing with NACA ducts for intercooler airflow

Wheels: OZ Racing LM-spec magnesium wheels (9x18 front, 13x18 rear) with titanium wheel bolts, shod in Pirelli P Zero Corsa tires (245/35ZR18 front, 335/30ZR18 rear) and air-jacked via a custom Air Lift Performance 3P system for rapid pit stops

Interior: Full Alcantara-trimmed cockpit with a Sparco LM-spec carbon-fiber seat (FIA 8862-2009 certified), a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel with integrated Motec C127 dash display, and a custom roll cage by Matter Italy (chromoly 4130, TIG-welded, with integrated fire suppression system ports)
